details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page, extracted the laureate data from the page snapshot, and correctly reported the 3 most recent years: 2025 (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis), 2024 (John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton), and 2023 (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier). The data was extracted from actual page content, not hallucinated.
